name: salesforce-deployment-tool
description: This extension is to streamline the deployment process between salesforce orgs (scratch orgs, sandboxes, and DE orgs).

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
scripts.package: npm run compile && esbuild src/assets/index.js --minify --outfile=out/assets/index.js && esbuild src/assets/index.css --minify --outfile=out/assets/index.css && esbuild out/extension.js --minify --outfile=out/extension-min.js && del out\extension.js && ren out\extension-min.js extension.js   && vsce package
